title: klasea monardii subsp. algarbiensis
intro: Klasea monardii subsp. algarbiensis is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, also known as a type of forget-me-not or algarve klasea. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health due to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. Klasea monardii subsp. algarbiensis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
